  path={"/v1/dns-lookup/cname"}

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}

  children={"Request"}
>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"maxAgeMs","required":false,"in":"query","description":"The maximum age of the cache in milliseconds [0]-fetch dns, [-1]-from cache","schema":{"example":5000,"type":"number"}},{"name":"domain","required":true,"in":"query","schema":{"example":"example.com","type":"string"}}]}
>

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"domain":{"type":"string","nullable":false,"description":"The domain name of the CNAME record.","example":"example.com"},"raw":{"type":"string","nullable":false,"description":"The raw CNAME record.","example":"target.example.com."},"object":{"type":"object","description":"The parsed CNAME record."},"validation":{"description":"The validation of the CNAME record.","allOf":[{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string","description":"The key of the validation message."},"message":{"type":"string","description":"The description of the validation."}},"required":["key","message"],"title":"ValidationMessage"}]},"queryStatus":{"example":"NOTFOUND","type":"string","description":"The status of the BIMI TXT record.","enum":["SUCCESS","NODATA","NOTFOUND","TIMEOUT","ERROR","SERVFAIL","NXDOMAIN"],"title":"DnsRecordStatus"},"timestamp":{"type":"number","description":"The timestamp of the CNAME record lookup.","example":1704067200000}},"required":["domain","raw","object","validation","queryStatus","timestamp"],"title":"CnameRecord"}}}},"400":{"description":"Bad Request"},"404":{"description":"Not Found"},"422":{"description":"Unprocessable Entity"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
